{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Emperor's sister
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Emperor's sister]] is tall and resplendent with [[emerald]] wings.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
